channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Salmon and Brined Chicken Drumsticks Dual Smoke Runbook
item.description: 🔥 KB: Salmon + Brined Chicken Drumsticks Dual Smoke Runbook Overview This runbook covers a staggered smoker workflow where: Salmon is smoked low and slow first Brined chicken drumsticks are introduced later at higher heat Both finish together with a final crisp phase at 325–350°F This method ensures: Salmon stays moist and tender Drumsticks are safely cooked from thawed state Both proteins finish at the same time 🧂 Stage 0: Drumstick Brine (Prep Phase) Ingredients Cold water (enough to submerge drumsticks) Salt (basic brine ratio: ~1–2 tbsp per quart of water) Steps Submerge drumsticks in salt brine Brine for 20–30 minutes max Remove and rinse lightly (optional) Pat completely dry Finish Prep Coat lightly with oil or melted butter Apply dry rub (paprika, garlic powder, pepper, BBQ rub) ⚠️ Critical: Dry surface = better crisp at high heat

item.title: Derrick's Standard Salmon Runbook
item.description: Smoked Salmon Runbook v2.0 Derrick’s Hybrid Super Smoke Method Objective Produce moist, flavorful smoked salmon with noticeable smoke flavor, bright lemon notes, and a lightly firmed exterior using a Traeger smoker and butcher paper boat. Target Internal Temp: 135-140°F Total Cook Time: ~2 to 2.5 hours Pellets: B&B Championship Blend Ingredients Salmon 1 salmon fillet (skin on) Seasoning Kosher salt Black pepper Garlic powder Citrus 1 lemon Half sliced Half reserved for juice Binder Light olive oil Equipment Traeger smoker Meat probe Butcher paper Spray bottle (optional) Phase 1 - Preparation 8:30 AM Prep Salmon Pat salmon dry

item.title: Derrick's 3 Rib Fest Guide
item.description: 🍖 Derrick’s 3-Rib Fest Pitmaster Runbook 🎛️ The Core Philosophy Ditch the Drudgery: No more 12-hour low-and-slow stall marathons. Controlled Heat Push: Operating at 265°F–275°F delivers better bark and rendering. Adhesion, then Acceleration: Short 225°F window for smoke, then push the gas. 📅 Night Before: Prep & Dry Brine Beef Plate Ribs: Coat heavily with kosher salt, coarse pepper, and garlic. Pork Rack: Apply light salt only (pre-enhanced), pepper, garlic, and optional rosemary/thyme.

item.title: Derrick's Baby Spare Ribs Runbook
item.description: Derricks-Baby-Spare-Ribs-Compressed-Pitmaster-Runbook 🎛️ Core Execution Philosophy Smoke Adhesion First: A short 40-minute 225°F window locks in color and flavor without wasting morning time. Early Acceleration: Step up to 265°F–275°F early to force fast rendering and bypass the traditional morning drag. Aggressive Post-Wrap: Run 275°F–290°F to crush the stall and finish the meat decisively. Texture Over Numbers: Rely primarily on the surface bend test rather than just raw digital probe data. 📅 The Profile & Prep Target Timeline: 7:30 AM load time for a 12:15 PM – 1:00 PM finish.

item.title: Overnight Traeger Brisket Runbook
item.description: 🥩 Overnight Traeger Brisket Runbook v1.1 🎯 Objectives Flavor: Deep wood smoke profile via early Super Smoke Bark: Dark mahogany crust locked in before wrapping Texture: Moist flat, rendered point fat, clean slices Effort: Maximum sleep with zero overnight intervention 🧰 Equipment & Prep Smoker Traeger Woodridge Pro Oak, Hickory, or Texas Blend pellets Tools Traeger meat probe Backup probe Pink butcher paper Cast iron pan Resting Setup Cooler 2–3 towels Aluminum foil 🔪 Trimming & Seasoning Brisket Trim into an aerodynamic oval shape Fat cap: 1/4 inch Remove hard deckle fat Tallow Setup Place all trimmed fat into a cast iron pan beneath the brisket.

item.title: Pitmaster Smoked Beef Tallow
item.description: 🔥 Derrick’s Pitmaster Tallow KB Cheat Sheet 🥩 PURPOSE Convert brisket + beef rib trim into: premium smoked beef tallow wrap enrichment cooking fat “Pitmaster Reserve” liquid gold 😂 🧠 CORE PHILOSOPHY Never throw away premium beef fat. Commercial BBQ brands: render it jar it market it charge $25–$65 We: make it during cooks naturally smoke it reuse it across BBQ sessions 🥩 BEST FAT SOURCES PRIME SOURCES ✅ Brisket fat cap

item.title: Restart Services
item.description: Restart nginx systemctl restart nginx Reload daemon systemctl daemon-reload
